description: List the TLDs Marque offers and their prices, for partner integrations.

tld.description: The TLD including leading dot, e.g. .com.

popular.description: Whether this TLD is featured as popular.

maxPeriod.description: Maximum registration period in years. Upper bound for an item's years in createCheckout; a larger value is capped to this.

minPeriod.description: Minimum registration period in years. Use as the lower bound for an item's years in createCheckout; a smaller value is raised to this.

renewPrice.description: Renewal price per year, in whole US dollars.

tldUnicode.description: Unicode display form of the TLD, if it differs from the ASCII form.

registerPrice.description: Registration price per year, in whole US dollars.

transferPrice.description: Transfer price, in whole US dollars.

transferAddsYear.description: Whether a transfer of this TLD adds a year of registration.

whoisPrivacyAllowed.description: Whether WHOIS privacy can be enabled for this TLD. When false, the years field in createCheckout still applies but whoisPrivacy is ignored.

tlds.description: All offered TLDs, one entry each.

main.description: Return the full catalog of available TLDs with register, renew, and transfer prices. Call it proxied through the user's PDS (atproto-proxy: did:web:marque.at#marque_registrar) with an at.marque.partnerApi-scoped token. Prices are in whole US dollars and may change; they exclude tax and any premium-domain surcharge (use checkAvailability for the price of a specific domain). Does not include premium pricing, which is per-domain.
